commands_run: pwd && rg --files data packages raw wiki | rg '(^data/identity-overrides/merges\.json$|do-not|canonical|review_notes|entity|entities|sources|metadata\.json|text\.txt)' | head -200

jq 'type, if type=="object" then keys[0:20] else length end' data/identity-overrides/merges.json && jq 'type, if type=="object" then keys[0:20] else length end' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

jq -r '[(.record_id),(.display_name // .payload.entity_name // ""),(.payload.entity_name // ""),(.payload.entity_type // ""),((.evidence_refs // []) | map(.evidence_id) | join("|"))] | @tsv' data/canonical/entities.jsonl > /tmp/mta_entities.tsv && awk -F'\t' '{name=tolower($2); gsub(/[^a-z0-9]+/," ",name); gsub(/^ +| +$/, "", name); if(name!="") print name"\t"$0}' /tmp/mta_entities.tsv | sort | awk -F'\t' 'prev==$1{if(!printed){print saved; printed=1} print $0; next} {prev=$1; saved=$0; printed=0}' | head -240
bun -e '<read-only candidate inspection against data/identity-overrides/merges.json, data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and data/canonical/entities.jsonl>'
